basic_details.job_title: IGRUA Assistant Aerodrome Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA) has officially announced the Assistant Aerodrome Officer Recruitment 2026 with 3 openings. Candidates between 21 and 35 years of age who hold a Commercial Pilot Licence (CPL), possess previous ATC working experience, a valid Class-I Medical Certificate, and have no disciplinary action on record can submit their applications through Email on or before 30 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: CPL Holder, Previous ATC working experience, Valid Class-I Medical Certificate, No disciplinary action on record
qualification.details: CPL Holder Previous ATC working experience Valid Class-I Medical Certificate No disciplinary action on record

salary_details.details: Rs. 40000/month + Transport Allowance Rs. 1800/month + Aviation Allowance Rs. 300/month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IGRUA Assistant Aerodrome Officer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IGRUA Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IGRUA Assistant Aerodrome Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Assistant Aerodrome Officer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IGRUA Assistant Aerodrome Officer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Assistant Aerodrome Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IGRUA Assistant Aerodrome Officer Recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IGRUA Assistant Aerodrome Officer Recruitment is 30th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Assistant Aerodrome Officer post?
faq.answer: To be eligible, candidates must be CPL holders, possess previous ATC working experience, hold a valid Class-I Medical Certificate, and have no disciplinary action on record.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Assistant Aerodrome Officer post is between 21 years and 35 years. Specific age relaxation rules may apply as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Aerodrome Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 40000 per month, along with a Transport Allowance of Rs. 1800 per month and an Aviation Allowance of Rs. 300 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IGRUA Assistant Aerodrome Officer job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to prepare their application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA) has announced a total of 3 vacancies for the post of Assistant Aerodrome Officer.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Assistant Aerodrome Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi located?
faq.answer: The Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA) is located in Amethi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 229302.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual recruitment drive for the post of Assistant Aerodrome Officer at Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA).
